documents.title: AgentFS design overview
documents.content: AgentFS provides a virtual filesystem layer over the agent's durable memory store. All KV operations are backed by SQLite with automatic retry on constraint violations.

documents.title: Hybrid retrieval strategy
documents.content: Hybrid retrieval combines BM25 full-text scoring with cosine-similarity vector search. Results are fused via reciprocal rank fusion (RRF) before re-ranking.

documents.title: Entity extraction pipeline
documents.content: Entity extraction runs as a post-ingest hook. Extracted entities are stored in the wiki's concept graph and used for entity-augmented retrieval.
